news.t: New Fed Rate Outlook Bodes Well for Senior Loans
Software Rebound Could Be a Catalyst for This Unique Bond ETF
Senior loan ETFs are seeing strong inflows as investors search for yield

overview.description: The Invesco Senior Loan ETF (BKLN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of senior loans issued by banks to corporations. BKLN was launched on Mar 3, 2011 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Senior loan ETFs are seeing strong inflows as investors search for yield
data.text: Clients who are seeking yield and worried about inflation are moving into senior bank loan ETFs and other short-term bond duration funds, says Invesco's Paglia.

data.title: Cybersecurity stocks are less risky tech stocks, says Andersen Capital Management CIO
data.text: Peter Anderson, Andersen Capital Management CIO, joins 'Power Lunch' to discuss why he likes certain cyber security stocks, why he likes tech stocks despite rising interest rates and more.
